question.label: Team connection
question.name: How connected do you feel to the rest of the team right now?
question.description: Probes isolation or drift without naming it; one of the earliest signals of disengagement.

answer: I can feel the shift since the reorg, even though I am trying to keep things stable for the team.

assessment.note: She acknowledges a real post-reorg shift while still trying to hold stability for the team, which suggests mild strain and some reduced connection rather than disengagement.

new_queue.label: Reorg shift
new_queue.name: Since the reorg shift, what feels most different for you day to day?

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?

new_queue.label: Landing context
new_queue.name: Before we get specific, what feels most useful to talk through today?

new_queue.label: Tradeoffs now
new_queue.name: What are you choosing to say yes to most deliberately right now?

new_queue.label: Scope strain
new_queue.name: What part of your current scope feels heaviest right now?

new_queue.label: Manager support
new_queue.name: What would you want more of from me right now?

new_queue.label: Next-step focus
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?

history.answer_excerpt: I can feel the shift since the reorg, even though I am trying to keep things stable for the team.
I can feel the shift since the reorg, even though I am trying to keep things stable for the team.
